003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.mock;
018
019import static java.util.Collections.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.IoUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
024import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.isEmpty;
025import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
026import static org.apache.juneau.http.HttpHeaders.*;
027
028import java.io.*;
029import java.security.*;
030import java.util.*;
031
032import org.apache.http.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.util.*;
035
036import jakarta.servlet.*;
037import jakarta.servlet.http.*;
038
039/**
040 * A mutable implementation of {@link HttpServletRequest} for mocking purposes.
041 *
042 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
043 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauRestMock">juneau-rest-mock Basics</a>
044 * </ul>
045 */
046@SuppressWarnings({
047   "resource" // Streams returned to servlet container; lifecycle managed by the container
048})
049public class MockServletRequest implements HttpServletRequest {
050
051   /**
052    * Creates a new servlet request.
053    *
054    * Initialized with the following:
055    * <ul>
056    *    <li><c>"Accept: text/json5"</c>
057    *    <li><c>"Content-Type: text/json"</c>
058    * </ul>
059    *
060    * @return A new request.
061    */
062   public static MockServletRequest create() {
063      return new MockServletRequest();
064   }
065
066   /**
067    * Creates a new servlet request with the specified method name and request path.
068    *
069    * Initialized with the following:
070    * <ul>
071    *    <li><c>"Accept: text/json5"</c>
072    *    <li><c>"Content-Type: text/json"</c>
073    * </ul>
074    *
075    * @param method The HTTP method  name.
076    * @param uri The request path.
077    * @param pathArgs Optional path arguments.
078    *
079    * @return A new request.
080    */
081   public static MockServletRequest create(String method, String uri, Object...pathArgs) {
082      return create().method(method).uri(f(uri, pathArgs));
083   }
084
085   private String method = "GET";
086   private Map<String,String[]> queryDataMap = map();
087   private Map<String,String[]> formDataMap;
088   private Map<String,String[]> headerMap = new TreeMap<>(String.CASE_INSENSITIVE_ORDER);
089   private Map<String,Object> attributeMap = map();
090   private String characterEncoding = "UTF-8";
091   private byte[] content = {};
092   private String protocol = "HTTP/1.1";
093   private String scheme = "http";
094   private String serverName = "localhost";
095   private int serverPort = 8080;
096   private String remoteAddr = "";
097   private String remoteHost = "";
098   private Locale locale = Locale.ENGLISH;
099   private int remotePort;
100   private String localName;
101   private String localAddr;
102   private int localPort;
103   private Map<String,RequestDispatcher> requestDispatcher = map();
104   private ServletContext servletContext;
105   private DispatcherType dispatcherType;
106   private String authType;
107   private Cookie[] cookies;
108   private String pathInfo;
109   private String pathTranslated;
110   private String contextPath = "";
111   private String queryString;
112   private String remoteUser;
113   private Principal userPrincipal;
114   private String requestedSessionId;
115   private String requestURI;
116   private String servletPath = "";
117   private HttpSession httpSession = MockHttpSession.create();
118
119   private String uri = "";
120
121   private Set<String> roles = set();
122
123   /**
124    * If the specified request is a
125    * {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic.MockRestRequest}, applies any of the override values
126    * to this servlet request.
127    *
128    * @param req The request to copy overrides from.
129    * @return This object.
130    */
131   @SuppressWarnings({
132      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for HTTP request override application
133   })
134   public MockServletRequest applyOverrides(HttpRequest req) {
135
136      if (req instanceof org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic.MockRestRequest req2) {
137         req2.getAttributeMap().forEach(this::attribute);
138         req2.getRequestDispatcherMap().forEach(this::requestDispatcher);
139         if (nn(req2.getCharacterEncoding()))
140            characterEncoding(req2.getCharacterEncoding());
141         if (nn(req2.getProtocol()))
142            protocol(req2.getProtocol());
143         if (nn(req2.getScheme()))
144            scheme(req2.getScheme());
145         if (nn(req2.getServerName()))
146            serverName(req2.getServerName());
147         if (nn(req2.getRemoteAddr()))
148            remoteAddr(req2.getRemoteAddr());
149         if (nn(req2.getRemoteHost()))
150            remoteHost(req2.getRemoteHost());
151         if (nn(req2.getLocalName()))
152            localName(req2.getLocalName());
153         if (nn(req2.getLocalAddr()))
154            localAddr(req2.getLocalAddr());
155         if (nn(req2.getPathInfo()))
156            pathInfo(req2.getPathInfo());
157         if (nn(req2.getPathTranslated()))
158            pathTranslated(req2.getPathTranslated());
159         if (nn(req2.getContextPath()))
160            contextPath(req2.getContextPath());
161         if (nn(req2.getQueryString()))
162            queryString(req2.getQueryString());
163         if (nn(req2.getRemoteUser()))
164            remoteUser(req2.getRemoteUser());
165         if (nn(req2.getRequestedSessionId()))
166            requestedSessionId(req2.getRequestedSessionId());
167         if (nn(req2.getRequestURI()))
168            requestURI(req2.getRequestURI());
169         if (nn(req2.getServletPath()))
170            servletPath(req2.getServletPath());
171         if (nn(req2.getAuthType()))
172            authType(req2.getAuthType());
173         if (nn(req2.getServerPort()))
174            serverPort(req2.getServerPort());
175         if (nn(req2.getRemotePort()))
176            remotePort(req2.getRemotePort());
177         if (nn(req2.getLocalPort()))
178            localPort(req2.getLocalPort());
179         if (nn(req2.getLocale()))
180            locale(req2.getLocale());
181         if (nn(req2.getServletContext()))
182            servletContext(req2.getServletContext());
183         if (nn(req2.getDispatcherType()))
184            dispatcherType(req2.getDispatcherType());
185         if (nn(req2.getCookies()))
186            cookies(req2.getCookies());
187         if (nn(req2.getUserPrincipal()))
188            userPrincipal(req2.getUserPrincipal());
189         if (nn(req2.getHttpSession()))
190            httpSession(req2.getHttpSession());
191         if (nn(req2.getRoles()))
192            roles(req2.getRoles());
193      }
194
195      return this;
196   }
197
198   /**
199    * Fluent setter.
200    *
201    * @param name Request attribute name.
202    * @param value Request attribute value.
203    * @return This object.
204    */
205   public MockServletRequest attribute(String name, Object value) {
206      this.attributeMap.put(name, value);
207      return this;
208   }
209
210   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
211   public boolean authenticate(HttpServletResponse response) throws IOException, ServletException {
212      return false;
213   }
214
215   /**
216    * Fluent setter.
217    *
218    * @param value The auth type.
219    * @return This object.
220    */
221   public MockServletRequest authType(String value) {
222      authType = value;
223      return this;
224   }
225
226   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
227   public String changeSessionId() {
228      return null;
229   }
230
231   /**
232    * Fluent setter.
233    *
234    * @param value The character encoding.
235    * @return This object.
236    */
237   public MockServletRequest characterEncoding(String value) {
238      characterEncoding = value;
239      return this;
240   }
241
242   /**
243    * Fluent setter.
244    *
245    * @param value
246    *    The body of the request.
247    *    <br>Can be any of the following data types:
248    *    <ul>
249    *       <li><code><jk>byte</jk>[]</code>
250    *       <li>{@link Reader}
251    *       <li>{@link InputStream}
252    *       <li>{@link CharSequence}
253    *    </ul>
254    *    Any other types are converted to a string using the <c>toString()</c> method.
255    * @return This object.
256    */
257   public MockServletRequest content(Object value) {
258      try {
259         if (value instanceof byte[] value2)
260            this.content = value2;
261         else if (value instanceof Reader value2)
262            this.content = readBytes(value2);
263         else if (value instanceof InputStream value2)
264            this.content = readBytes(value2);
265         else if (value instanceof CharSequence value2)
266            this.content = value2.toString().getBytes();
267         else if (nn(value))
268            this.content = value.toString().getBytes();
269      } catch (IOException e) {
270         throw toRex(e);
271      }
272      return this;
273   }
274
275   /**
276    * Fluent setter.
277    *
278    * @param value The context path.
279    * @return This object.
280    */
281   public MockServletRequest contextPath(String value) {
282      contextPath = value;
283      return this;
284   }
285
286   /**
287    * Fluent setter.
288    *
289    * @param value The cookies.
290    * @return This object.
291    */
292   public MockServletRequest cookies(Cookie[] value) {
293      cookies = value;
294      return this;
295   }
296
297   /**
298    * Fluent setter.
299    *
300    * @param value The dispatcher type.
301    * @return This object.
302    */
303   public MockServletRequest dispatcherType(DispatcherType value) {
304      dispatcherType = value;
305      return this;
306   }
307
308   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
309   public AsyncContext getAsyncContext() { return null; }
310
311   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
312   public Object getAttribute(String name) {
313      return attributeMap.get(name);
314   }
315
316   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
317   public Enumeration<String> getAttributeNames() { return Collections.enumeration(attributeMap.keySet()); }
318
319   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
320   public String getAuthType() { return authType; }
321
322   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
323   public String getCharacterEncoding() { return characterEncoding; }
324
325   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
326   public int getContentLength() { return content == null ? 0 : content.length; }
327
328   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
329   public long getContentLengthLong() { return content == null ? 0 : content.length; }
330
331   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
332   public String getContentType() { return getHeader("Content-Type"); }
333
334   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
335   public String getContextPath() { return contextPath; }
336
337   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
338   public Cookie[] getCookies() { return cookies; }
339
340   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
341   public long getDateHeader(String name) {
342      var s = getHeader(name);
343      if (s == null)
344         return 0;
345      var zonedDateTimeOpt = date(s).asZonedDateTime();
346      return zonedDateTimeOpt.isPresent() ? zonedDateTimeOpt.get().toInstant().toEpochMilli() : 0;
347   }
348
349   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
350   public DispatcherType getDispatcherType() { return dispatcherType; }
351
352   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
353   public String getHeader(String name) {
354      var s = headerMap.get(name);
355      return s == null || s.length == 0 ? null : s[0];
356   }
357
358   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
359   public Enumeration<String> getHeaderNames() { return Collections.enumeration(headerMap.keySet()); }
360
361   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
362   public Enumeration<String> getHeaders(String name) {
363      var s = headerMap.get(name);
364      return Collections.enumeration(l(s == null ? new String[0] : s));
365   }
366
367   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
368   public ServletInputStream getInputStream() throws IOException {
369      if (nn(formDataMap))
370         content = UrlEncodingSerializer.DEFAULT.toString(formDataMap).getBytes();
371      return new BoundedServletInputStream(new ByteArrayInputStream(content), Integer.MAX_VALUE);
372   }
373
374   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
375   public int getIntHeader(String name) {
376      var s = getHeader(name);
377      return ie(s) ? 0 : Integer.parseInt(s);
378   }
379
380   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
381   public String getLocalAddr() { return localAddr; }
382
383   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
384   public Locale getLocale() { return locale; }
385
386   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
387   public Enumeration<Locale> getLocales() { return Collections.enumeration(l(locale)); }
388
389   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
390   public String getLocalName() { return localName; }
391
392   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
393   public int getLocalPort() { return localPort; }
394
395   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
396   public String getMethod() { return method; }
397
398   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
399   public String getParameter(String name) {
400      var s = getParameterMap().get(name);
401      return s == null || s.length == 0 ? null : s[0];
402   }
403
404   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
405   public Map<String,String[]> getParameterMap() {
406      if ("POST".equalsIgnoreCase(method)) {
407         if (formDataMap == null) {
408            var listMap = RestUtils.parseQuery(read(content));
409            formDataMap = map();
410            for (var e : listMap.entrySet()) {
411               if (e.getValue() == null)
412                  formDataMap.put(e.getKey(), null);
413               else
414                  formDataMap.put(e.getKey(), array(e.getValue(), String.class));
415            }
416         }
417         return formDataMap;
418      }
419      return queryDataMap;
420   }
421
422   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
423   public Enumeration<String> getParameterNames() { return enumeration(toList(getParameterMap().keySet())); }
424
425   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
426   public String[] getParameterValues(String name) {
427      return getParameterMap().get(name);
428   }
429
430   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
431   public Part getPart(String name) throws IOException, ServletException {
432      return null;
433   }
434
435   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
436   public Collection<Part> getParts() throws IOException, ServletException { return Collections.emptyList(); }
437
438   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
439   public String getPathInfo() {
440      if (pathInfo == null) {
441         pathInfo = getRequestURI();
442         if (ine(contextPath))
443            pathInfo = pathInfo.substring(contextPath.length());
444         if (ine(servletPath))
445            pathInfo = pathInfo.substring(servletPath.length());
446      }
447      return nie(urlDecode(pathInfo));
448   }
449
450   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
451   public String getPathTranslated() {
452      if (pathTranslated == null)
453         pathTranslated = "/mock-path" + getPathInfo();
454      return pathTranslated;
455   }
456
457   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
458   public String getProtocol() { return protocol; }
459
460   @Override
461   public String getProtocolRequestId() { return null; }
462
463   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
464   @SuppressWarnings({
465      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for query string construction
466   })
467   public String getQueryString() {
468      if (queryString == null) {
469         if (queryDataMap.isEmpty())
470            queryString = "";
471         else {
472            var sb = new StringBuilder();
473            queryDataMap.forEach((k, v) -> {
474               if (v == null)
475                  sb.append(sb.isEmpty() ? "" : "&").append(urlEncode(k));
476               else
477                  for (var v2 : v)
478                     sb.append(sb.isEmpty() ? "" : "&").append(urlEncode(k)).append('=').append(urlEncode(v2));
479            });
480            queryString = sb.toString();
481         }
482      }
483      return isEmpty(queryString) ? null : queryString;
484   }
485
486   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
487   public BufferedReader getReader() throws IOException { return new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(getInputStream(), characterEncoding)); }
488
489   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
490   public String getRemoteAddr() { return remoteAddr; }
491
492   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
493   public String getRemoteHost() { return remoteHost; }
494
495   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
496   public int getRemotePort() { return remotePort; }
497
498   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
499   public String getRemoteUser() { return remoteUser; }
500
501   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
502   public RequestDispatcher getRequestDispatcher(String path) {
503      return requestDispatcher.get(path);
504   }
505
506   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
507   public String getRequestedSessionId() { return requestedSessionId; }
508
509   @Override
510   public String getRequestId() { return null; }
511
512   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
513   public String getRequestURI() {
514      if (requestURI == null) {
515         requestURI = uri;
516         requestURI = requestURI.replaceAll("^\\w+\\:\\/\\/[^\\/]+", "").replaceAll("\\?.*$", "");
517      }
518      return requestURI;
519   }
520
521   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
522   public StringBuffer getRequestURL() { return new StringBuffer(uri.replaceAll("\\?.*$", "")); }
523
524   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
525   public String getScheme() { return scheme; }
526
527   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
528   public String getServerName() { return serverName; }
529
530   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
531   public int getServerPort() { return serverPort; }
532
533   @Override
534   public ServletConnection getServletConnection() { return null; }
535
536   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
537   public ServletContext getServletContext() { return servletContext; }
538
539   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
540   public String getServletPath() { return servletPath; }
541
542   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
543   public HttpSession getSession() { return httpSession; }
544
545   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
546   public HttpSession getSession(boolean create) {
547      return httpSession;
548   }
549
550   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
551   public Principal getUserPrincipal() { return userPrincipal; }
552
553   /**
554    * Fluent setter.
555    *
556    * @param name Header name.
557    * @param value
558    *    Header value.
559    *    <br>The value is converted to a simple string using {@link Object#toString()}.
560    * @return This object.
561    */
562   public MockServletRequest header(String name, Object value) {
563      if (nn(value)) {
564         var v1 = (value instanceof String[] stringArray) ? stringArray : a(value.toString());
565         var v2 = headerMap.get(name);
566         var v3 = combine(v2, v1);
567         headerMap.put(name, v3);
568      }
569      return this;
570   }
571
572   /**
573    * Fluent setter.
574    *
575    * @param value The HTTP session.
576    * @return This object.
577    */
578   public MockServletRequest httpSession(HttpSession value) {
579      httpSession = value;
580      return this;
581   }
582
583   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
584   public boolean isAsyncStarted() { return false; }
585
586   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
587   public boolean isAsyncSupported() { return false; }
588
589   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
590   public boolean isRequestedSessionIdFromCookie() { return false; }
591
592   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
593   public boolean isRequestedSessionIdFromURL() { return false; }
594
595   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
596   public boolean isRequestedSessionIdValid() { return false; }
597
598   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
599   public boolean isSecure() { return false; }
600
601   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
602   public boolean isUserInRole(String role) {
603      return roles.contains(role);
604   }
605
606   /**
607    * Fluent setter.
608    *
609    * @param value The local address.
610    * @return This object.
611    */
612   public MockServletRequest localAddr(String value) {
613      localAddr = value;
614      return this;
615   }
616
617   /**
618    * Fluent setter.
619    *
620    * @param value The locale.
621    * @return This object.
622    */
623   public MockServletRequest locale(Locale value) {
624      locale = value;
625      return this;
626   }
627
628   /**
629    * Fluent setter.
630    *
631    * @param value The local name.
632    * @return This object.
633    */
634   public MockServletRequest localName(String value) {
635      localName = value;
636      return this;
637   }
638
639   /**
640    * Fluent setter.
641    *
642    * @param value The local port.
643    * @return This object.
644    */
645   public MockServletRequest localPort(int value) {
646      localPort = value;
647      return this;
648   }
649
650   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
651   public void login(String username, String password) throws ServletException {
652      // No-op: Mock implementation - full functionality not required
653   }
654
655   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
656   public void logout() throws ServletException {
657      // No-op: Mock implementation - full functionality not required
658   }
659
660   /**
661    * Fluent setter.
662    *
663    * @param value The method name for this request.
664    * @return This object.
665    */
666   public MockServletRequest method(String value) {
667      method = value;
668      return this;
669   }
670
671   /**
672    * Enabled debug mode on this request.
673    *
674    * <p>
675    * Prevents errors from being logged on the server side if no-trace per-request is enabled.
676    *
677    * @param value The enable flag value.
678    * @return This object.
679    */
680   public MockServletRequest noTrace(boolean value) {
681      if (value)
682         header("No-Trace", "true");
683      return this;
684   }
685
686   /**
687    * Fluent setter.
688    *
689    * @param value The path info.
690    * @return This object.
691    */
692   public MockServletRequest pathInfo(String value) {
693      pathInfo = value;
694      return this;
695   }
696
697   /**
698    * Fluent setter.
699    *
700    * @param value The path translated.
701    * @return This object.
702    */
703   public MockServletRequest pathTranslated(String value) {
704      pathTranslated = value;
705      return this;
706   }
707
708   /**
709    * Adds the specified parent path variables to this servlet request.
710    *
711    * <p>
712    * See {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic.MockRestClient.Builder#pathVars(Map)} for an example.
713    *
714    * @param pathVars The
715    * @return This object.
716    * @see org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic.MockRestClient.Builder#pathVars(Map)
717    */
718   public MockServletRequest pathVars(Map<String,String> pathVars) {
719      if (nn(pathVars))
720         this.attributeMap.put("juneau.pathVars", new TreeMap<>(pathVars));
721      return this;
722   }
723
724   /**
725    * Add resolved path variables to this client.
726    *
727    * <p>
728    * Identical to {@link #pathVars(Map)} but allows you to specify as a list of key/value pairs.
729    *
730    * @param pairs The key/value pairs.  Must be an even number of parameters.
731    * @return This object.
732    */
733   public MockServletRequest pathVars(String...pairs) {
734      return pathVars(mb(String.class, String.class).addPairs((Object[])pairs).build());
735   }
736
737   /**
738    * Fluent setter.
739    *
740    * @param value The protocol.
741    * @return This object.
742    */
743   public MockServletRequest protocol(String value) {
744      protocol = value;
745      return this;
746   }
747
748   /**
749    * Fluent setter.
750    *
751    * @param value The query string.
752    * @return This object.
753    */
754   public MockServletRequest queryString(String value) {
755      queryString = value;
756      return this;
757   }
758
759   /**
760    * Fluent setter.
761    *
762    * @param value The remote address.
763    * @return This object.
764    */
765   public MockServletRequest remoteAddr(String value) {
766      remoteAddr = value;
767      return this;
768   }
769
770   /**
771    * Fluent setter.
772    *
773    * @param value The remote port.
774    * @return This object.
775    */
776   public MockServletRequest remoteHost(String value) {
777      remoteHost = value;
778      return this;
779   }
780
781   /**
782    * Fluent setter.
783    *
784    * @param value The remote port.
785    * @return This object.
786    */
787   public MockServletRequest remotePort(int value) {
788      remotePort = value;
789      return this;
790   }
791
792   /**
793    * Fluent setter.
794    *
795    * @param value The remote user.
796    * @return This object.
797    */
798   public MockServletRequest remoteUser(String value) {
799      remoteUser = value;
800      return this;
801   }
802
803   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
804   public void removeAttribute(String name) {
805      this.attributeMap.remove(name);
806   }
807
808   /**
809    * Fluent setter.
810    *
811    * @param name The path to resolve.
812    * @param value The request dispatcher.
813    * @return This object.
814    */
815   public MockServletRequest requestDispatcher(String name, RequestDispatcher value) {
816      this.requestDispatcher.put(name, value);
817      return this;
818   }
819
820   /**
821    * Fluent setter.
822    *
823    * @param value The requested session ID.
824    * @return This object.
825    */
826   public MockServletRequest requestedSessionId(String value) {
827      requestedSessionId = value;
828      return this;
829   }
830
831   /**
832    * Fluent setter.
833    *
834    * @param value The request URI.
835    * @return This object.
836    */
837   public MockServletRequest requestURI(String value) {
838      requestURI = value;
839      return this;
840   }
841
842   /**
843    * Adds the specified role on this request.
844    *
845    * @param role The role to add to this request (e.g. <js>"ROLE_ADMIN"</js>).
846    * @return This object.
847    */
848   public MockServletRequest role(String role) {
849      this.roles = set(role);
850      return this;
851   }
852
853   /**
854    * Adds the specified roles on this request.
855    *
856    * @param roles The roles to add to this request (e.g. <js>"ROLE_ADMIN"</js>).
857    * @return This object.
858    */
859   public MockServletRequest roles(String...roles) {
860      this.roles = set(roles);
861      return this;
862   }
863
864   /**
865    * Fluent setter.
866    *
867    * @param value The scheme.
868    * @return This object.
869    */
870   public MockServletRequest scheme(String value) {
871      scheme = value;
872      return this;
873   }
874
875   /**
876    * Fluent setter.
877    *
878    * @param value The server name.
879    * @return This object.
880    */
881   public MockServletRequest serverName(String value) {
882      serverName = value;
883      return this;
884   }
885
886   /**
887    * Fluent setter.
888    *
889    * @param value The server port.
890    * @return This object.
891    */
892   public MockServletRequest serverPort(int value) {
893      serverPort = value;
894      return this;
895   }
896
897   /**
898    * Fluent setter.
899    *
900    * @param value The servlet context.
901    * @return This object.
902    */
903   public MockServletRequest servletContext(ServletContext value) {
904      servletContext = value;
905      return this;
906   }
907
908   /**
909    * Fluent setter.
910    *
911    * @param value The servlet path.
912    * @return This object.
913    */
914   public MockServletRequest servletPath(String value) {
915      servletPath = value;
916      return this;
917   }
918
919   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
920   public void setAttribute(String name, Object o) {
921      this.attributeMap.put(name, o);
922   }
923
924   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
925   public void setCharacterEncoding(String characterEncoding) throws UnsupportedEncodingException { this.characterEncoding = characterEncoding; }
926
927   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
928   public AsyncContext startAsync() throws IllegalStateException {
929      return null;
930   }
931
932   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
933   public AsyncContext startAsync(ServletRequest servletRequest, ServletResponse servletResponse) throws IllegalStateException {
934      return null;
935   }
936
937   @Override /* Overridden from HttpServletRequest */
938   public <T extends HttpUpgradeHandler> T upgrade(Class<T> handlerClass) throws IOException, ServletException {
939      return null;
940   }
941
942   /**
943    * Fluent setter.
944    *
945    * @param uri The URI of the request.
946    * @return This object.
947    */
948   public MockServletRequest uri(String uri) {
949      uri = emptyIfNull(uri);
950      this.uri = uri;
951
952      if (uri.indexOf('?') != -1) {
953         var qs = uri.substring(uri.indexOf('?') + 1);
954         if (qs.indexOf('#') != -1)
955            qs = qs.substring(0, qs.indexOf('#'));
956         queryString = qs;
957         var listMap = RestUtils.parseQuery(qs);
958         for (var e : listMap.entrySet()) {
959            if (e.getValue() == null)
960               queryDataMap.put(e.getKey(), null);
961            else
962               queryDataMap.put(e.getKey(), array(e.getValue(), String.class));
963         }
964      }
965
966      return this;
967   }
968
969   /**
970    * Fluent setter.
971    *
972    * @param value The user principal.
973    * @return This object.
974    */
975   public MockServletRequest userPrincipal(Principal value) {
976      userPrincipal = value;
977      return this;
978   }
979
980   /**
981    * Enabled debug mode on this request.
982    *
983    * <p>
984    * Causes information about the request execution to be sent to STDERR.
985    *
986    * @param value The enable flag value.
987    * @return This object.
988    */
989   public MockServletRequest debug(boolean value) {
990      if (value)
991         header("Debug", "true");
992      return this;
993   }
994}
